title: Monday Board (Files Uploaded) to OneDrive Folder
excerpt:
Is there a way to integrate OneDrive with Monday whereby all files/documents uploaded on a board gets uploaded in OneDrive too? 
I’m having troubles connecting it using Make or Zapier! Would be nice if someone had the sa…

posts.author: ericacollantes (Erica Collantes)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to integrate OneDrive with Monday whereby all files/documents uploaded on a board gets uploaded in OneDrive too?
I’m having troubles connecting it using Make or Zapier! Would be nice if someone had the same issue and found a solution!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Erica,

At this stage syncing files from monday to one-drive relies on third party involvement, such as Make or Zapier. If you’re having issues with this external integration, I recommend posting our developers community → monday Apps & Developers - monday Community Forum

posts.author: kevin_vaghasiya (kevin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ericacollantes,

You can use monday.com: Apps Marketplace app.
